title: Setting Up NOWPayments Webhooks: Everything You Need to Get Started — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're an ebook author in Nigeria, struggling to sell your digital book because PayPal won't let you create a business account due to a 'high-risk' IP address. You've tried Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip, but they all block your transactions because you're from a restricted country. It's time to break free from these limitations and start selling your ebook online without relying on PayPal. In this post, we'll show you how to set up a digital download store using NOWPayments webhooks, the key to automating your sales and delivery. We'll walk you through a step-by-step setup guide that will have you selling ebooks and digital products in no time, without any fees or subscription charges. With the Core Shop Engine ($49.99), you'll be able to sell your digital products from anywhere in the world, without the need for a payment processor account.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The traditional payment platforms have failed you because they're designed to serve the majority, not the outliers. NOWPayments webhooks, on the other hand, are a game-changer for creators from restricted countries. This method works by bypassing the payment processor's approval process and directly sending payments to your wallet. It's secure, transparent, and free from the clutches of restrictive payment platforms.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, you'll need a NOWPayments account, a digital product to sell, and a way to deliver it to your customers. You'll also need a secure wallet to store your cryptocurrency payments. Don't worry, we'll guide you through the setup process step-by-step, so you can get started in no time. Make sure you have your Core Shop Engine ($49.99) ready to go, as we'll be integrating it with NOWPayments webhooks to automate your sales and delivery.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, you'll need to create a new NOWPayments account and enable webhooks. This will allow you to receive notifications whenever a payment is made. Next, you'll need to set up your Core Shop Engine ($49.99) to integrate with NOWPayments. This will enable automated delivery of your digital products to your customers, along with PDF receipts to confirm the transaction. Make sure to test your setup thoroughly to ensure everything is working as expected.
You don't need a PayPal account to sell ebooks or digital products online.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live and make your first sale. Share your digital product with your audience and start promoting it on social media. As soon as a payment is made, your Core Shop Engine ($49.99) will automatically deliver the product to the customer, while also sending a PDF receipt to confirm the transaction. Monitor your sales and adjust your marketing strategy as needed to optimize your results.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your sales increase, you can scale your digital download store by adding more products, marketing channels, and analytics tools. With the Core Shop Engine ($49.99) and NOWPayments webhooks, you'll be able to handle a high volume of transactions without any issues. Make sure to keep your setup secure and up-to-date to avoid any potential problems. With this system in place, you'll be able to focus on creating more digital products and growing your business, instead of worrying about payment processing and delivery.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
NOWPayments webhooks allow you to automate your sales and delivery without relying on traditional payment platforms.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking to sell digital products like ebooks, courses, and templates without using PayPal or other restrictive payment platforms, you're in the right place. By using NOWPayments webhooks and the Core Shop Engine ($49.99), you'll be able to create a digital download store that works everywhere, without any fees or subscription charges. Check out our Core Shop Engine ($49.99) for more information on how to get started with your own digital download store. You can also visit https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see our digital download store in action.
Your Action Checklist

To set up your digital download store using NOWPayments webhooks, follow these steps: Create a new NOWPayments account and enable webhooks, set up your Core Shop Engine ($49.99) to integrate with NOWPayments, configure your payment and delivery pipeline, test your setup thoroughly, and go live with your digital product. Share your product with your audience and start promoting it on social media, monitor your sales and adjust your marketing strategy as needed, and scale your digital download store as your sales increase.
The Core Shop Engine ($49.99) is the key to creating a digital download store that works everywhere, without any fees or subscription charges.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
